name: Danzig & Goldwasser
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the caraway seeds, anise seeds, ground coriander, cinnamon stick, lemon peel, and cloves in a blender or food processor.
2. Blend for a few minutes until well combined.
3. Add all ingredients except the sugar syrup and gold flecks (if using) to a clean bottle of vodka.
4. Seal the bottle tightly and let steep for 1 1/2 weeks at room temperature, allowing the flavors to meld together.
5. Strain the mixture through cheesecloth into another container, pressing on the solids to extract as much liquid as possible.
6. Add the sugar syrup and gold flecks (if using) to taste. Stir gently until well combined.
